case_summary: Garage opener motor humming but the door doesn't move; mechanical linkage seems intact.

ground_truth.notes: Motor-side fault — the opener attempts to run but the door doesn't move and there's no obvious spring/cable failure. Tests routing to garage_door_fault and that the system distinguishes a motor/opener failure from a spring or cable failure.

inputs.user_text: When we press the remote, our garage door motor unit makes a humming sound for a few seconds and then stops, but the door doesn't actually move. The springs and cables look intact from what we can see. We can still open the door manually after releasing the trolley, so it's not stuck.
